svg.title: Orifold takes the shorter path from scattered files to one finished PDF
svg.desc: Three clearly separated panels compare the usual PDF detour, Orifold's private native workspace, and the polished result. Animated documents move through an origami crane without uploads, subscriptions, or app hopping.

g.text: A shorter path from scattered to polished.
The market adds gates. Orifold folds the whole job into one private Mac workspace.
Everything stays local. Everything stays together.
NO UPLOAD · NO RELAY · NO PAYWALL
Finished on your Mac. Ready to send.
